headline: Assessing Eaton’s Valuation As Air Support Partnership Expands In The Aerospace Aftermarket
summary: Eaton expands aerospace aftermarket reach with Air Support Eaton (ETN) is widening its partnership with Air Support, giving the European service provider authority to repair additional aircraft engine fuel system components and offering airlines broader access to OEM grade aftermarket support. See our latest analysis for Eaton. Alongside this aerospace agreement and a recently affirmed quarterly dividend of $1.10 per share, Eaton’s share price has logged an 18.63% 30 day return and 29.52%...

headline: Eaton Corp. (ETN) Strengthens Customer Support Commitment with Expanded Authorized Service Center Agreement
summary: Eaton Corporation plc (NYSE:ETN) is one of the 10 Best Under-the-Radar Data Center Stocks to Buy. Eaton’s stock has registered 50.14% year-on-year growth and 26.45% year-to-date gains. On April 13, Citigroup Inc. adjusted its price target on Eaton upward to $464 from $435 while maintaining a Buy rating. The increase was made amid target adjustments […]
